text: I am against the GST slab of 28% which is very harsh on common citizens.
The tax slab of 30% for individuals earning above 20 lakhs is too high, it's a burden on our pockets.
I oppose the practice of TDS on rent, it's a complex and time-consuming process.
The government should reconsider the tax on gold, it's a necessary item for weddings and other occasions.
The income tax exemption limit should be increased to 30 lakhs, it's too low for middle-class citizens.
The tax on online transactions is too high, it's a burden on students and freelancers who buy online courses.
I am against the tax on agricultural income, it's the backbone of our economy and our livelihood.
The government should simplify the tax return process, it's too complicated and time-consuming.
The tax on property transactions is too high, it's a burden on homebuyers and sellers.
I oppose the tax on private education, it's a necessary investment for our children's future.
The tax on health insurance is too high, it's a necessary expense for our families.
The GST registration process is too complicated, it's a burden on small business owners.
The tax on foreign exchange is too high, it's a burden on travelers and students who study abroad.
I am against the tax on pension, it's a necessary income for our seniors.
The tax on charitable donations is too high, it's a necessary act of kindness for our society.
The government should reduce the tax slab for senior citizens above 60 years from 20% to 10%, making it easier for them to live comfortably.
I fully support the proposed tax exemption for women entrepreneurs, it will encourage more women to start their own businesses.
The income tax exemption limit for farmers should be increased from ₹5 lakh to ₹10 lakh, as their income is directly linked to crop yields.
The tax-free threshold for gifts received from friends and family should be increased to ₹50,000, allowing people to show their love and care without incurring taxes.
The government should introduce a tax holiday for start-ups in Tier-II and Tier-III cities, promoting entrepreneurship and job creation in these regions.
The exemption for housing loan interest up to ₹2 lakh should be extended to self-occupied homes, helping people to own their dream homes.
I strongly support the proposed tax relief for first-time homebuyers, it will help young couples to purchase their first home with ease.
The tax exemption for education loans should be increased from ₹8 lakh to ₹10 lakh, supporting students to pursue higher education without financial burden.
The government should simplify the GST refund process for small businesses, reducing their compliance burden and increasing their competitiveness.
The tax deduction for charitable donations should be increased from 50% to 75% of the donor's taxable income, promoting philanthropy and social welfare.
The exemption for medical expenses over ₹1 lakh should be extended to all citizens, regardless of their income, to alleviate the financial burden of medical treatment.
The government should increase the tax-free threshold for foreign earnings from ₹10 lakh to ₹20 lakh, attracting more foreign talent to India and boosting economic growth.
The tax deduction for home maintenance expenses should be increased from ₹30,000 to ₹50,000, helping homeowners to maintain their properties without incurring additional taxes.
The government should introduce a tax credit scheme for small businesses, allowing them to set off their tax liability against their GST credits, promoting cash flow and reducing debt burden.
The tax exemption for disability benefits should be increased from ₹50,000 to ₹1 lakh, supporting individuals with disabilities and their families to live with dignity.

Can I claim GST input credit on goods purchased for personal use?
I have not received my tax credit certificate for the past year, how do I get it?
I am unsure about the deadline for filing GST returns for my small business, please clarify.
My employer has not provided me with Form 16 for the last financial year, what should I do?
I am trying to apply for an ITR-V but the website keeps saying 'service unavailable', please help.
Can I claim deduction under Section 80C for my LIC premium payment?

I have not received my PAN card after applying for it in January 2023, what's the status?
My bank has deducted TDS on my interest income but I am unsure if it's correct or not, please help me verify.
I am trying to link my bank account with my PAN card but the website is not accepting my PAN number, help.
Ayushman Bharat scheme ka koi upyog nahi kar rahi, humko koi bhi treatment nahi mil raha.
Mere pasu ka cancer hai, lekin hospital mein paise wapas karne ke baad bhi treatment nahi kar raha.
AIIMS ka doctor ne meri beti ko wrong diagnosis kiya, ab uski health bahut zyada buri hoyi hai.
Public hospital mein ambulance nahi mil raha, mere saath aapne dudh ka koi upchar nahi kar raha.
Yeh hospital ka doctor ka behaviour bahut aswachh thha, meri maa ko apne saath nahi rakhne diya.
Kai mahilaon ko maternity benefits milne ka wait karnaa pad rha hai, yeh sarkar ki sharmnaak baat hai.
Dusre hospital mein jaa kar apne saath bhi doctor ne kha raha aur main bhi kharab condition mein aaya hu.
Rog nahi hua hai lekin doctor ne isse bhi surgery karane ko kaha, apne paas bhi paise wapas karne pade.
Yeh public hospital mein koi bhi upkar nahi karta, apne saath se bhi mere liye kuch nahin hai.
Dusre mahine maine yeh hospital ka ek doctor se upchar liya tha, woh bhi khatam ho chuka hai.
Private hospital ka bill kharab hai, mera pata hai ki yeh government se loan lekar kharab conditions mein rah raha hai.
Yeh hospital ka doctor ne meri madad nahi ki, apne saath bhi kuch bhi karnaa chhod gaya.
Yeh ambulance ka driver ne mere saath kaam karne se mana kar diya, apne saath bhi koi upchar nahi kiya.
Beti ko koi nahi sun rha hai, apne saath bhi main bhi nahi jaa sakta hospital mein.
Yeh doctor ne mere saath bhi apne saath treatment nahi ki, apne saath bhi kuch bhi nahi karna chhod gaya.
I request the government to launch a health insurance scheme for senior citizens to cover their medical expenses in old age.
There should be a dedicated helpline for patients to know their medical test results and appointment availability.
We need more government-funded health checkup camps in rural areas to detect diseases at an early stage.
Please provide more incentives to young doctors to practice in rural areas where there is a shortage of doctors.
Kindly increase the number of ICU beds available in government hospitals to reduce patient waiting times.
I urge the government to introduce a policy to ban the sale of tobacco products near schools and hospitals.
We need a strict enforcement of the 72-hour rule for emergency patients to ensure they get timely medical attention.
Please launch a public awareness campaign to educate people about the importance of organ donation.
I request the government to provide free or subsidized medical treatment to cancer patients.
There should be more emphasis on mental health treatment and counseling services in government hospitals.
I suggest the government to introduce a telemedicine system to provide medical consultations remotely.
We need more medical facilities for women and children in government hospitals, especially in rural areas.
Please increase the number of blood banks in rural areas to ensure timely blood supply for emergencies.
I request the government to introduce a policy to ban the use of single-use plastics in hospitals and medical institutions.
We need more government-funded research on Ayurveda and other traditional Indian medicinal systems.
Why are there always long queues at government hospitals in India?
I had to pay extra money for medicine not included in the government health insurance in my city.
Hospitals in India do not provide enough information in languages other than Hindi and English.
There is a lack of specialists in rural areas of India for timely medical treatment.
I was asked to pay a bribe for a medical certificate from a government hospital.
Indian government should make Ayushman Bharat Scheme registration process online for faster registration.
There are not enough dialysis machines available in government hospitals in major cities.
In order to obtain a health ID card, I had to give a hefty photocopying and documentation charges.
Indian government hospitals often do not provide follow-up care to patients after discharge.
Why should I pay extra for medical tests when they are supposed to be free under government schemes?
Medical stores in India often have expired or damaged medicines available for purchase.
My grandmother waited for 3 hours in the emergency ward of a government hospital in Delhi.
Indian government should provide financial assistance to people who cannot afford medical treatment in private hospitals.
The process of getting a medical bill reimbursed under government health insurance is too complicated.
Many government hospitals in India lack basic amenities like drinking water and sanitation.
Why is the road from Delhi to Jaipur still under repair after 3 years, it's affecting my business trips.
Metro stations in Mumbai are overcrowded and stinky, the government should increase the frequency of trains.

The speed cameras in Hyderabad are too slow to respond, it's a waste of money.

I'm tired of waiting for the metro in Hyderabad, it's time for the government to increase the number of trains.
The drainage system in Mumbai is clogged, my home is full of water during monsoon.
The government should fix the potholes on NH44 in Punjab, it's affecting my daily commute.
Why is the road from Chandigarh to Amritsar still under construction after 2 years?
The lack of footpaths in Ahmedabad is a hazard for pedestrians, the government should make them a priority.
I think the government should provide more streetlights in our locality to increase safety at night
It would be great if our municipality could widen this road to reduce traffic congestion during peak hours
I support the idea of building a new flyover in our area to ease commute time
There should be more public toilets available near our railway station for passengers' convenience
I think the government should repair the potholes on our main road to prevent accidents
It's a good idea to have more bike lanes in our city to promote cycling as a mode of transport

I support the proposal to extend the metro line to our area to make public transport more accessible

The traffic signals in our city should be automated to reduce congestion and pollution
I think our local school could benefit from better internet connectivity for online learning
It's a good idea to have more pedestrian crossings in our city to increase safety for pedestrians
The government should provide more public parking spaces in our area to reduce congestion
I think our local hospital could be improved with better infrastructure and more staff
I support the idea of introducing electric vehicle charging stations in our city to promote sustainable transport
Our education system is not providing enough jobs to students after graduation, it's a big waste of time and money.
NCERT textbooks are not updated with current events and technologies, it's affecting students' knowledge and competitiveness.
Government schools in rural areas are still lacking basic infrastructure like electricity, water, and toilets, how can students learn properly?
Board exams are too stressful and don't assess students' creativity and skills, it's time to change the pattern.
Private schools are charging exorbitant fees, it's not fair to the middle-class families who can't afford it.
Teachers are not getting a proper salary and are overworked, it's affecting their morale and performance.
Online education is still not accessible to many students due to lack of devices and internet connectivity, it's a big disadvantage.
The new National Education Policy is not addressing the needs of rural and marginalized students, it's a big disappointment.
Exams are being held in Hindi, but not all students are proficient in Hindi, it's creating a barrier for non-Hindi speakers.
There is no emphasis on vocational training and skill development, it's time to change the curriculum.
The education system is not preparing students for competitive exams, it's a big letdown.
Government is not providing enough scholarships and financial aid to meritorious students, it's a big injustice.
Private tuition is becoming a norm, it's not fair to students who can't afford it, and it's affecting the quality of education.
There is no uniformity in the syllabus across states and boards, it's causing confusion for students and parents.
Government is not addressing the issue of teacher shortage, it's affecting the quality of education, especially in rural areas.

Government should increase the allocation for scholarships to meritorious students from economically backward classes.

We need more emphasis on skill development programs for rural students to equip them with employable skills.

The government should introduce a policy to provide free internet access to all students to facilitate online learning.
I support the initiative to set up digital classrooms in rural areas to bridge the educational gap.

We need more teacher training programs to equip them with modern teaching methods and technology.
Government should consider introducing a policy to provide free counseling services to students who are unsure about their career choices.
I support the proposal to introduce a credit-based system for degree courses to allow students to pursue multiple subjects.
Government should introduce a policy to provide incentives to students who pursue education in rural and underserved areas.
I request the government to improve the infrastructure of schools in rural areas to create a conducive learning environment.

The constant increase in pollution levels is causing a severe decline in air quality in our cities.
The government's failure to address the climate crisis is putting our country and its future at risk, we need urgent action.
I want more tree plantation campaigns in our city to reduce air pollution.
Can we start a recycling program in our building to reduce plastic waste?
I support the government's plan to increase renewable energy sources, let's make it happen soon.
There should be more community gardens in our neighborhood for organic farming.
